Here's the if-statement, if (grade == "A") { gradeValue = 4.0; } else if (grade == "B") { gradeValue = 3.0; } else if (grade == "C") { gradeValue = 2.0; } else if (grade == "D") { gradeValue = 1.0; }. Your task is not only to interchange if with a switch scenario but also to ensure that the resulting function has optimal efficiency. Wrap every word bigram in double angular brackets, such as <<I am>> <<at home>> <<with my>> <<cute dog>>.
